subject: Cloud Computing
title: Azure and the AI Advantage
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Azure and the AI Advantage.

hook.text: Microsoft invested $13 billion in OpenAI. Then it embedded GPT into Azure and Office products.

buildup.text: Azure OpenAI Service lets enterprises use GPT, DALL-E, and Codex through Microsoft's cloud.

discovery.text: The deal was strategic: companies using Azure for AI are unlikely to move their other workloads away.

twist.text: Google invented the transformer architecture behind GPT. But Microsoft commercialized it first on cloud.

climax.text: AI is now Azure's growth engine. Companies choose Azure to access OpenAI models they can't get elsewhere.

punchline.text: Microsoft didn't invent AI. It made AI easy to buy.

quiz.question: How did the OpenAI partnership benefit Azure?
options: It gave Azure exclusive enterprise access to GPT models, attracting new customers
OpenAI built Azure's entire cloud infrastructure from scratch
The partnership made Azure services completely free for AI researchers
